name: Bigtincan Sales Enablement API
what_it_does: Bigtincan REST API for AI-powered sales enablement platform combining content management, learning, and collaboration. Enables AI agents to access sales content, retrieve engagement analytics, manage files and stories, and integrate Bigtincan data into CRM and sales workflow automation. Bigtincan has strong mobile-first design and AI content recommendations.
use_cases: Accessing sales content and stories from field sales workflow agents
Retrieving content engagement analytics from revenue analytics agents
Managing file and content libraries from marketing operations agents
Integrating Bigtincan usage data into CRM and sales coaching agents
not_for: SMB without dedicated sales enablement needs
best_when: A field sales or revenue organization using Bigtincan wants AI agents to surface relevant content, track engagement, and integrate enablement analytics into CRM.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement tracking requires governance. Enterprise-only platform requiring Bigtincan agreement. Australian company with AU data residency.

auth.notes: Bigtincan API uses OAuth 2.0. Enterprise access required. Contact Bigtincan for developer access. API documentation is private.

pricing.notes: Australian publicly-traded company. Enterprise pricing negotiated with Bigtincan sales.

performance.rate_limits: Enterprise rate limits; not publicly documented

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement behavioral data requires consent and governance
No public MCP server — enterprise OAuth2 API required
Australian company — AU data residency available; APAC considerations
API documentation is private — enterprise customers only
Consider Seismic or Highspot for more developer-accessible alternatives
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Buyer engagement data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. AU data residency — good for APAC deployments.

security_score_components.security_notes: Buyer engagement data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. AU data residency available.
